## Key Insights

- **Referral Machine = 3 I's**: Intentional + Invested + Integrated
- **WOW Box ROI**: $170 → referrals 15% → 60% (Burleson Ortho case)
- **Indifference = 68% churn**: Preço é razão #6, não #1
- **Foundation before machine**: 4 layers required before referral system
- **ABC segmentation**: Differential investment por tier de cliente
- **Omnipresence**: 280+ non-sales communications/year (GKIC model)
